    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AboutDialog
    About dialog of the AdVoid application.
    AppColor
    Utility class that defines the color palette used throughout the application.
    DetailsPanel
    Panel that displays detailed information about local and network media files.
    DetailsPanel.MediaItem
    Represents a media file (local, network or both).
    DetailsPanel.MediaItem.State
     
    EditPanel
    Preferences and configuration panel of the application.
    LoginPanel
    Login panel of the AdVoid application.
    Main
    Main window of the AdVoid application.
